lookup(name, deps, value, args): list[dict[str, Any]]
EnricherEngine is a thin DSL/runtime wrapper:
- builds a lightweight deps namespace for provider-backed operations
- conflict resolution + merge policy + sink validation
ambiguous enrich results are materialized as `meta.resolve_requests`
